query: SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME IN ('judge_streams','judge_applications','live_sessions','stream_summaries','xp_events','user_badges','song_reactions','moderation_logs','notifications','page_views','live_radio_queue','live_radio_state','line_skip_credits','reward_logs','rewards','user_rewards','wheel_of_names_entries','wheel_of_names_paid_entries','wheel_of_names_spins') ORDER BY TABLE_NAME;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 45x8Wz3k6WBARWw.root --database C3bFVoBEaMVXmYZLRysziz --execute SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME IN ('judge_streams','judge_applications','live_sessions','stream_summaries','xp_events','user_badges','song_reactions','moderation_logs','notifications','page_views','live_radio_queue','live_radio_state','line_skip_credits','reward_logs','rewards','user_rewards','wheel_of_names_entries','wheel_of_names_paid_entries','wheel_of_names_spins') ORDER BY TABLE_NAME;
